title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at American Institute - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at American Institute - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the American Institute family as a Curriculum Developer in Tiruchirappalli. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About American Institute:
American Institute is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with American Institute!
